candidates.why: A separate operating-level depreciation line is visible above the financial section, but it is not labeled as relating to cost of goods / cost of revenues. The selected COGS bucket is 'Cost of Goods' plus 'Wages and salaries'; this depreciation row does not clearly sit inside that bucket nor is it clearly a COGS-specific add-on. To avoid misclassification and double counting, it should not be added to COGS.

variables.notes: Generic operating 'Depreciation' is visible, but there is no indication that it is specifically COGS-related.

candidates.why: A separate operating-level depreciation row is present, but the selected XSGA reference bucket already includes 'Operating expenses', which appears to be a broader parent/total operating-expense row. 'Depreciation' appears alongside/under that broader operating-expense structure rather than as a clearly separate SG&A-only row, so adding it separately risks double counting.

variables.notes: Because 'Operating expenses' is already selected in XSGA_COMPONENTS and likely acts as a parent row, the separate 'Depreciation' line should not be added separately.
